overall_explanation: The patch moves build-time d3-geo projection work out of `heatmap.astro` and into a pre-generated snapshot (`json/heatmap-map.json`), refreshed via `bun run heatmap:refresh`. The three changed files are internally consistent: `heatmap.astro` drops all projection imports and passes no props to the island; `VietnamMap.tsx` becomes self-contained by importing the snapshot directly; `package.json` wires up the refresh script. Server-side stats and the hotspot list in `heatmap.astro` still operate correctly on the same province data, now sourced from the JSON rather than live GeoJSON projection. Type assertions (`heatmapMap as Props`, `heatmapMap as { provinces: ProvinceUnit[] }`) are consistent with the known JSON shape and were verified by `bun run check` and `bun run build`. No actionable defects are introduced by this change.
